data.body:
Goal:
Incorporate the latest overview annotations: show unabbreviated knot ids when All Repositories is selected, include expected empty workflow-state columns, hide shipped beats from the overview, and show lease metadata on active-state tiles when available.

Verification:
1. Run `bun run lint` and expect success.
2. Run `bunx tsc --noEmit` and expect success.
3. Run `bun run test` and expect success.
4. Run `bun run build` and expect success.
5. Open `http://localhost:4137/beats?view=overview&state=queued` with All Repositories selected and confirm ids are unabbreviated, Ready For Plan Review / Ready For Impl Review / Shipment / Ready For Shipment / Ready For Shipment Review columns are present even when empty or sparse, shipped is absent, active tiles show lease info when available, and no lease records appear as beats.

Constraints:
Keep the overview an inspection surface, not a kanban board. Preserve compact column density and contained mobile horizontal scrolling.
data.title: Refine beat overview annotations
